one_line_verdict: A charming, imagination-fueled animated adventure best suited for families with kids and animation fans — worth a theatrical trip for the vibrant visuals, but perfectly enjoyable on streaming if you miss it.
english_note: Light, comedic animated dialogue; no heavy jargon or complex accents — very accessible for all ages and non-native speakers.
credits_detail: Likely features a brief mid- or post-credits comedic scene — a common convention in animated family films; speculative based on genre norms.
one_line_summary: A teen swaps her body for a robotic beaver — wildly fun animated adventure for the whole family.
